title: 菊花賞の後に・真剣勝負をもう一度

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Rrrrgh... Aaaaaah, I was so close!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: I thought for sure I coulda held on a little longer! And I made my move at the perfect time too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Well, no matter what I say, it won't a change a
thing. Congrats, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You're as strong as I imagined. But that doesn't
mean you're winning the next one, hear?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Next time, I'm gonna really bring the heat!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course! This isn't over.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The next time we face each other, neither one of
us shall hold back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Our competition will be fierce, just as today's was!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
With the Kikuka Sho finished, there is little left to
do this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Soon after we welcome in the new year, it will be
time for—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
My number one objective... I will show everyone
the culmination of all my hard work!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen's fiery determination is
palpable, her eyes fixed firmly on what lies
ahead.
